name: knowledge-observer
description: Transparent background knowledge observer for Claude Code — builds a human-readable knowledge graph of your project's decisions, facts, and open questions, and feeds it back into every session.

knowledge_dir.title: Knowledge storage directory
knowledge_dir.description: Where this project's knowledge graph is stored. A RELATIVE path (default .claude/knowledge) resolves per-project, so multiple projects stay isolated automatically. Set an ABSOLUTE path only per-project, in <project>/.claude/observer.json — a global absolute path would funnel every project into one folder.

enabled.title: Enabled
enabled.description: Turn the observer on/off for this project.

model.title: Observer model
model.description: Optional claude model id for the background observer agent (blank = CLI default).

prompt_extra.title: Extra extraction guidance
prompt_extra.description: Appended to the built-in extraction prompt — project-specific hints for what to record.

idle_daemon_secs.title: Daemon idle shutdown (seconds)
idle_daemon_secs.description: The per-project single-writer daemon shuts down after this much idle time (default 600).
